title: Maastricht, Limburg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Maastricht, Limburg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Maastricht is a city in Limburg with a population of 125,285. A historic, cosmopolitan city in the deep south with a distinct Burgundian flair, nestled between Belgium and Germany.

Last updated: July 06, 2026
